A1400B_MDCR_OPYR_SW A1400B - Payer: Medicare (Managed Care/Part C/Medicare Advantage.) CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is Medicare (Managed Care/Part C/Medicare Advantage.). 0 = No 
1 = Yes
628 A1400C_MDCD_FFS_PYR_SW A1400C_MDCD_FFS_PYR_SW A1400C - Payer: Medicaid (FFS) CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is Medicaid (FFS). 0 = No 
1 = Yes
